response.overview: After the loss of her father, Meghana buries herself in work while her overprotective mother, Lakshmi, tries to control every aspect of her life. But when a mysterious twist swaps their bodies for a day, the mother-daughter duo are forced to live each other's struggles, secrets, and emotions. As chaos turns into understanding, one question remains: what caused the swap in the first place?
response.title: Anaganaga O Sukravaram
